title: Role

id.description: The unique ID of the role.

status.description: The role status. Possible values: active, inactive.

name.description:
The name of the role. Predefined roles are localized based on the request language.
Max length: 255

key.description:
The internal key used for translating predefined role names.
Max length: 255

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the role was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the role was last updated.

projectIds.description: The list of projects where the user is associated with this role.

description: The requested page of roles associated with the user.
